description: Poisonous tree-frog folk with a rigid color-based caste system and a taste for territorial warfare.
subraces: Common laborers and warriors forming the backbone of every grung settlement.
Artisan caste members crafting weapons, building structures, and raising grung young.
Administrators and commanders enforcing caste law and directing military campaigns.
Elite scholars and magic-users advising the ruling caste on arcane matters.
Superior warriors hand-picked as personal bodyguards for the gold-caste rulers.
Ruling monarchs whose word is absolute law, their skin glittering with sacred authority.
